name: pagecraft-example
description: A document workspace built with Octane and @octanejs/lexical, exercising deep links, rich-text selection, versioned autosave, and failure recovery.

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && PAGECRAFT_DIST=1 playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts && PAGECRAFT_COLD_DEV=1 playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts
